content.problemStatement:
You are participating in an elite chess tournament for 444 people in the world only.

There are prizes in this tournament, obviously. If you finish rank iii, you get 1000⋅24−i1000 \cdot 2^{4 - i}1000⋅24−i rupees. Thus, the prizes are as follows:


Rank 111: 800080008000 rupees
Rank 222: 400040004000 rupees
Rank 333: 200020002000 rupees
Rank 444: 100010001000 rupees
You finished at rank XXX. How much prize money did you win?


Input Format

The first and only line of input contains a single integer XXX, your rank.


Output Format
Output the amount of prize money you won in rupees.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
As explained in the statement, rank 111 wins 1000⋅2(4−1)=80001000 \cdot 2^{(4 - 1)} = 80001000⋅2(4−1)=8000 rupees.
